title: coreocarpus congregatus
intro: Coreocarpus congregatus, also known as the congregating shrub or yellowhead, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coreocarpus congregatus include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and aiding in the management of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Coreocarpus congregatus include teas, infusions, and topical applications, which can be made by boiling the leaves and flowers in water or mixing them with other herbal remedies.
